overview: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (Vignan University), located in Vadlamudi, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh, is a premier autonomous deemed-to-be university established in 2008. The university is known for its industry-oriented engineering education, modern laboratory infrastructure, student-centric academic ecosystem, and globally aligned curriculum. It has received prestigious ABET accreditation for key engineering branches including CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical Engineering, and Biotechnology.
accreditation: Deemed-to-be University; NAAC Accredited; ABET Accredited for CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical Engineering, and Biotechnology programs.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech CSE / IT / AI-ML / Data Science
B.Tech Civil / Mechanical / EEE / Chemical / Robotics

placements.totalOffers: 811 UG students and 94 PG students placed
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Cognizant, Accenture, Infosys, Wipro, HCL Technologies, HSBC

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through the university's V-SAT examination and AP EAPCET counseling process for undergraduate engineering programs.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules follow V-SAT examination timelines and AP EAPCET counseling calendar.

campus.messDetails: Integrated mess system with vegetarian and non-vegetarian meal options on rotation basis.
campus.specialNote: The university campus is built across a green landscaped environment in the Andhra Pradesh capital region with industry-focused infrastructure and international academic standards.

details: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver for top V-SAT and AP EAPCET rank holders
Special fee concessions for JEE Advanced qualified students
Sports scholarships and merit-based academic awards
Semester-wise performance scholarships for high achievers

contact.address: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Vadlamudi, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh, India
contact.admissionsInfo: Admissions are handled through V-SAT and AP EAPCET counseling channels.
